chunks.content:
BROKER_LISTEN_ADDR=127.0.0.1:8081
BROKER_JOB_STORE_PATH=.broker/jobs.json
BROKER_RUN_ROOT_PATH=.broker/runs
BROKER_REPO_ROOT_PATH=/absolute/path/to/local-ai-broker
BROKER_AUDIT_LOG_PATH=.broker/audit.jsonl
BROKER_AUDIT_VERIFY_MODE=warn

BROKER_AUTH_MODE=header

BROKER_BACKEND=slurm
BROKER_SLURM_MODE=command
BROKER_SLURM_SUBMIT_CMD=sbatch
BROKER_SLURM_STATUS_CMD=sacct
BROKER_SLURM_CANCEL_CMD=scancel
BROKER_SLURM_SCRIPT_PATH=deploy/slurm/broker_worker.slurm

# Tier-to-placement mapping for a cluster with one shared GPU partition.
# The broker selects GPU type per tier and emits a real Slurm GPU request.
BROKER_SLURM_PARTITION_CPU=cpu
BROKER_SLURM_PARTITION_GPU=hpc
BROKER_SLURM_GPU_REQUEST_MODE=gres
BROKER_SLURM_GPU_TYPE_P40=p40
BROKER_SLURM_GPU_TYPE_V100=v100
BROKER_SLURM_GPU_TYPE_A100=a100
BROKER_SLURM_NODELIST_P40=pllimsksparky[1-4]
# Optional tier-specific constraints if your scheduler uses features as well.
# BROKER_SLURM_CONSTRAINT_P40=p40

# GPU service control plane. Fill every REPLACE value before enabling it.
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_ENABLED=false
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_REGISTRY_PATH=.broker/gpu-services.json
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_CONTROL_REQUEST_DIR=.broker/gpu-services.json.requests
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_CONTROL_TOKEN=REPLACE_WITH_RANDOM_256_BIT_TOKEN
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_SCRIPT_PATH=deploy/slurm/gpu_service.slurm
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_LEASE_DURATION_SECONDS=14400
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_HEALTH_INTERVAL_SECONDS=15
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_HEARTBEAT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=45
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_STARTUP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=600
# Stable shared cache for persisted semantic retrieval indexes. If unset, the
# launcher stores them next to BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_REGISTRY_PATH.
# BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_INDEX_CACHE_DIR=.broker/semantic-index-cache
# Allow cold full-repo embedding/index builds to run longer than ordinary
# search/rerank calls.
# BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_INDEX_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=600
# Optional retrieval-tier batching knobs for faster cold semantic indexing.
# BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_EMBED_BATCH_ITEMS=16
# BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_EMBED_BATCH_TOKENS=2048
# BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_EMBED_SEGMENT_TOKENS=256

BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_RETRIEVAL_PROFILE=REPLACE_P40_RETRIEVAL_PROFILE
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_RETRIEVAL_MODEL_PATH=/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/P40_RETRIEVAL_MODEL
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_RETRIEVAL_QUANTIZATION=REPLACE_QUANTIZATION
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_RETRIEVAL_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=16384
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_RETRIEVAL_RUNTIME=/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/RETRIEVAL_SERVICE
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_RETRIEVAL_RUNTIME_ARGS_JSON='["--model","{model_path}","--host","{host}","--port","{port}","--ctx-size","{context_limit_tokens}","--embeddings","--reranking","--pooling","mean"]'
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_RETRIEVAL_MIN_REPLICAS=1
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_RETRIEVAL_MAX_REPLICAS=2

BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_SYNTHESIS_PROFILE=REPLACE_P40_SYNTHESIS_PROFILE
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_SYNTHESIS_MODEL_PATH=/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/P40_SYNTHESIS_MODEL
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_SYNTHESIS_QUANTIZATION=REPLACE_QUANTIZATION
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_SYNTHESIS_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=16384
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_SYNTHESIS_RUNTIME=/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_RUNTIME
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_SYNTHESIS_RUNTIME_ARGS_JSON='["--model","{model_path}","--host","{host}","--port","{port}"]'
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_SYNTHESIS_MIN_REPLICAS=1
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_P40_SYNTHESIS_MAX_REPLICAS=2

BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_V100_REASONING_PROFILE=REPLACE_V100_REASONING_PROFILE
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_V100_REASONING_MODEL_PATH=/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/V100_REASONING_MODEL
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_V100_REASONING_QUANTIZATION=REPLACE_QUANTIZATION
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_V100_REASONING_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_V100_REASONING_RUNTIME=/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_RUNTIME
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_V100_REASONING_RUNTIME_ARGS_JSON='["--model","{model_path}","--host","{host}","--port","{port}","--tensor-parallel-size","{gpu_count}"]'
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_V100_REASONING_MIN_REPLICAS=0
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_V100_REASONING_MAX_REPLICAS=1

BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_SINGLE_PROFILE=REPLACE_A100_SINGLE_PROFILE
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_SINGLE_MODEL_PATH=/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/A100_SINGLE_MODEL
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_SINGLE_QUANTIZATION=REPLACE_QUANTIZATION
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_SINGLE_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_SINGLE_RUNTIME=/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_RUNTIME
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_SINGLE_RUNTIME_ARGS_JSON='["--model","{model_path}","--host","{host}","--port","{port}"]'
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_SINGLE_MIN_REPLICAS=0
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_SINGLE_MAX_REPLICAS=1

BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_MULTIGPU_PROFILE=REPLACE_A100_MULTIGPU_PROFILE
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_MULTIGPU_MODEL_PATH=/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/A100_MULTIGPU_MODEL
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_MULTIGPU_QUANTIZATION=REPLACE_QUANTIZATION
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_MULTIGPU_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=65536
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_MULTIGPU_RUNTIME=/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_RUNTIME
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_MULTIGPU_RUNTIME_ARGS_JSON='["--model","{model_path}","--host","{host}","--port","{port}","--tensor-parallel-size","{gpu_count}"]'
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_MULTIGPU_MIN_REPLICAS=0
BROKER_GPU_SERVICE_A100_MULTIGPU_MAX_REPLICAS=1

# Runtime endpoint routing staged into execution_plan.json.
# Point this at a reachable local or forwarded llama.cpp server when you want
# the RAG worker to use live local reranking/compression instead of deterministic
# fallback behavior.
# BROKER_RUNTIME_LLAMACPP_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8080
BROKER_RUNTIME_LLAMACPP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=20
# BROKER_RUNTIME_VLLM_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000
# BROKER_RUNTIME_VLLM_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=20
# BROKER_RUNTIME_SGLANG_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:30000
# BROKER_RUNTIME_SGLANG_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=20

# Broker-side fanout controls. Keep these modest until cluster behavior is known.
BROKER_PARALLEL_MAX_BATCH_SIZE=32
BROKER_PARALLEL_MAX_ACTIVE_BATCHES=2
BROKER_ROOT_ACTION_MAX_ADDITIONAL_BATCHES=1
BROKER_ROOT_ACTION_MAX_RETRIED_SHARDS=4

# Expected execution policy with this profile:
# - cpu-rag-indexing      -> partition cpu
# - p40-retrieval/p40-synthesis -> partition hpc, gres gpu:p40:1
# - v100-reasoning              -> partition hpc, gres gpu:v100:4
# - a100-single                 -> partition hpc, gres gpu:a100:1
# - a100-multigpu               -> partition hpc, gres gpu:a100:4
#
# Retry recommendations produced by the broker will reuse these partition
# mappings automatically when a degraded local retrieval run is retried.
